onboarding.headline: LawSaw quick start
onboarding.dashboard.title: See regulatory moves as they happen
onboarding.dashboard.description: Dashboard brings together the global regulatory pulse: world-map hotspots, a time slider, industry trends, and a role-tiered news feed. Drill into hotspots, switch windows by day/week/month/year.
onboarding.articles.title: Read and save articles
onboarding.articles.description: In Articles browse and filter the full catalogue with list or card views. The reader gives you a sticky table-of-contents on the left, quick actions (save, share) on the right, and a Markdown-source view alongside the rendered article.
onboarding.reports.title: Scheduled and ad-hoc reports
onboarding.reports.description: Reports manages subscription weekly/monthly/quarterly reports and on-demand briefings. Export to PDF/HTML subject to your role, and track the state machine (draft - generating - approved - published).
onboarding.feedback.title: Feedback and collaboration
onboarding.feedback.description: Report bugs, suggest features, or request new sources through Feedback. Submissions enter the admin review queue; progress and replies stream in live.
onboarding.settings.title: Personalize your workspace
onboarding.settings.description: Settings exposes theme/compact-mode toggles, notification preferences, security options, API keys, and system info. On first use we recommend completing your profile and notification preferences first.
